title: Trellis Tasks
description: Machine-readable task breakdown for trellis:build. Generated by the task-writer agent from plan.md and spec.md. Serves as both task definition and execution state — status fields are updated in-place during implementation.

check.description: CLI command chain that must exit 0 for code to be correct. Sourced from guidelines.md Check Command section. Empty string means not yet configured.

judge.description: Whether to run the judge agent after all tasks complete. Default true, opt-out with --no-judge.

redefinitionPass.description: Current redefinition pass (0 = initial run, 1-3 = redefinition passes). Updated by ralph-loop.sh after each redefiner run.

id.description: Task identifier (e.g., '1.1', '2.3'). Phase number dot task number.

phase.description: Phase number this task belongs to. Phases are sequential.

title.description: Short action-oriented title. Verb-first: 'Create data model', 'Implement validation logic'.

do.description: What to build. References specific plan sections, file paths, patterns. Concrete enough that the builder doesn't need to re-read the full plan.

verify.description: How to confirm the task is done. Observable checks: test passes, command output, API response. Used by test-writer to generate tests.

parallel.description: Whether this task can run in parallel with adjacent tasks in the same phase.

status.description: Execution state. Updated in-place by update-tasks.py or the build skill.

iteration.description: Which ralph iteration completed this task. Null if pending or blocked.

source.description: Which post-judge agent created this task. Absent for original tasks generated by the task-writer.
